description_long: This is a modern, two-story house set within a walled property featuring a spacious green lawn, multiple trees, and a large swimming pool with a circular spa. The house has a flat roof design, extensive use of large glass windows, and a minimalist geometric structure with clean lines. The front facade is accentuated by a double-gate entry, a paved driveway, and a prominent entryway flanked by columns. The backyard includes a poolside lounging area with several sunbeds and a separate patio space, while two detached structures, likely garages or storage sheds, are positioned at the sides. The property is surrounded by a tall, solid fence with stone and metal detailing, providing privacy and security. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and functional luxury.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, a swimming pool, and landscaped grounds enclosed by a tall fence. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and luxury amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double gates, driveway, and prominent columns, as well as the landscaped front yard and partial view of the pool area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large swimming pool, sunbeds, and patio area, with the back facade's extensive windows and secondary structures visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, sunbeds, and patio, as well as the house's geometric structure and the detached buildings on the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the driveway, garage area, and the rear garden, with the house's flat roof and window arrangement visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a double gate, paved driveway, prominent columns, and a minimalist overhang with no porch.
